Los baños que fué lo único que use, están siempre impecable
Conseguir estacionar no es fácil, siempre muchos vehiculos

The restrooms, which were the only thing I used, are always spotless. Finding parking isn't easy; there are always a lot of cars.

reviews.comment:
Me pusieron nafta en el gasoil y nadie se hizo responsable. Al encargado lo fui a buscar a la casa varias veces y a La guardería y nunca lo encontré

(Translated by Google)
They put gasoline in my diesel and no one took responsibility. I went to the caretaker's house and daycare several times, but I never found him.

reviews.comment:
Atención muy lenta. La dinámica de despacho de combustible podría mejorase con poco esfuerzo. Esto redundaría em clientes más satisfechos.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service. Fuel dispatch dynamics could be improved with little effort. This would result in more satisfied customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0c2Rpb0xBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siguen teniendo las mejores medialunas, me recuerda a mi niñez cuando el local era la casa con techo de tejas. Aún conserva el parque atrás del edificio. La mejor opción en la zona

(Translated by Google)
They still have the best croissants. It reminds me of my childhood when the place was the house with the tiled roof. It still has the park behind the building. The best option in the area.
